message:
test(unit): expand inline tests for watchdog, accounts (+42) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

watchdog.rs: +15 tests covering WatchdogConfig, Component, HealthStatus,
ComponentHealth, HealthReport, MuxWatchdogConfig, MuxHealthSample,
MuxHealthReport trait impls (Debug/Clone/Copy/Hash/Eq/Display/Ord/serde).

accounts.rs: +27 tests covering AccountRecord, AccountSelectionConfig,
AccountSelectionResult, QuotaAvailability, AccountQuotaAdvisory,
SelectionExplanation, FilteredAccount, CandidateAccount,
AccountExhaustionInfo trait impls and edge cases (serde snake_case,
is_blocking variants, threshold boundaries, parse_reset_at_ms edges).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
